answer: Incident ix-9r2-nexus-774 affected boreal margin capture index on 2027-01-07, 2027-01-13, and 2027-01-22. Root cause was helios bridge writing misaligned quartz ledger epoch from incorrect source stream_scan_zeta_09 through pipeline pipe_krypton_19b. Metadata source fm_src_gamma_51 should have been used instead. Remediation involved flushing the quartz ledger epoch before helios bridge warmup, owned by team-mercury-delta. Signal family sigfam_crimson_088 with validation marker vm-beryl-559-ok tracked the issue from source asset asset.obsidian_reef_207.

facts.remediation: flush quartz ledger epoch before helios bridge warmup
facts.root_cause: helios bridge wrote misaligned quartz ledger epoch
